_comment: Phase A catalyst seeds AA submits to osd (POST /api/alpha/catalyst/submit). Each must be machine-verifiable: a numeric/binary condition in `description` and a real future `target_date` (YYYY-MM-DD). `key` is a stable id used to avoid resubmitting. AA submits up to OSD_SUBMIT_MAX_PER_RUN unsubmitted seeds per run; vague seeds (no number/date) are skipped. Add real catalysts below.

catalysts.description: Q2 FY27 decision on 2026-08-26 (after close): total revenue exceeds the guidance high end of $92.8B (guide was $91.0B +/- 2%).
FQ4 2026 earnings: revenue exceeds the prior quarter's $41.46B, setting a new quarterly record.
